title: Cinematic Landing Hero
description: A GSAP ScrollTrigger-driven full-screen hero with a 7000px pinned scroll timeline. An intro text reveal leads into a deep-blue premium card that expands to full-screen, revealing an iPhone mockup with progress ring counter, floating glass badges, and left/right copy. Ends with a pull-back to a CTA section with App Store / Google Play buttons. Mouse parallax tilts the phone mockup.
